user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
Absolutely — here’s a warmer, more empathetic version you can send before escalating:

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry this has been such a frustrating experience. I understand how disappointing it is when things don’t work as expected, and I appreciate your patience while we work through it.

I’d like to try one more thing with you before we take the next step. If you’re open to it, please [insert brief next step]. In some cases, that can resolve the issue right away.

If that doesn’t help, please reply with [any details needed], and I’ll make sure we have everything needed to investigate properly.

Thanks again for bearing with us — I’m here to help.

Best,  
[Your Name / Support Team]

If you want, I can also make it:
- more apologetic
- shorter and friendlier
- tailored to the exact issue the customer reported
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly followed the user's instruction by providing a more empathetic draft and offering further ways to customize the tone.
